title: CellularSection
description: CellularSection: Steel section to be used on Bars. Defined by a SectionProfile.

Name.description: A unique name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Area.description: Area of the cross section through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

Rgy.description: Radius of gyration about the local Y-Axis as the arithmetic mean between the solid and open parts of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Rgz.description: Radius of gyration about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

J.description: Torsion Constant through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type TorsionConstant meassured in [m⁴].

Iy.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Y-Axis as the arithmetic mean between the solid and open parts of the section. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea meassured in [m⁴].

Iz.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea meassured in [m⁴].

Iw.description: Warping Constant through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type WarpingConstant meassured in [m⁶].

Wely.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Welz.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Wply.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Wplz.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis through the section with the largest opening. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

CentreZ.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Z direction. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

CentreY.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Y direction. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to top edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vpz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to bottom edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to right edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vpy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to Left edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Asy.description: Shear Area in the local Y direction through the section with the largest opening. Only acounts for contributions from the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

Asz.description: Shear Area in the local Z direction through the section with the largest opening. Only acounts for contributions from the uncut parts of the web. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
